dataset_title: The Geography of Opportunity — official metro inputs
geography: Metropolitan statistical areas represented by five-digit CBSA codes
publisher: U.S. Census Bureau, American Community Survey 1-year estimates

tables.B20002: Median earnings in the past 12 months for the population 16 years and over with earnings
tables.B15003: Educational attainment for the population 25 years and over
tables.B28002: Presence and types of internet subscriptions in household
tables.B23025: Employment status for the population 16 years and over

notes: Population and resident employment growth compare ACS 2023 and ACS 2024 one-year estimates.
The employment-to-population ratio is employed civilians divided by the population age 16 and over.
Broadband subscription is households with broadband of any type divided by total households.
Coordinates are approximate display points and do not affect scores.
